---
title: "Vary-Coefficient Spatial Temporal Synthetic Error Model"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source(file.path("R", "load_project.R"))
pstsem_source_project(load_packages = TRUE)
```

## Project Smoke Check

```{r}
pstsem_check_packages(stop_on_missing = FALSE)
empirical_data <- pstsem_load_empirical_data()
length(empirical_data$state)
dim(empirical_data$W)
```

## Legacy Chunk Manifest

```{r}
pstsem_chunk_manifest()
```

Run the full legacy workflows from `scripts/` when reproducing long empirical or
simulation experiments.
